Terms & Privacy
Terms of Service
Last updated: January 2025
1. Service Description
Housizy is a construction materials delivery platform operating in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. We connect buyers with verified suppliers for same-day and express delivery of building materials.
2. Orders & Delivery
Orders are accepted subject to stock availability. Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to traffic, weather, or demand. Minimum order value is ₹500.
3. Returns & Refunds
Returns accepted within 48 hours for damaged or wrong items. Refunds processed in 3–5 business days. Used materials cannot be returned.
4. Pricing
Prices are inclusive of GST where applicable. Bulk discounts apply automatically at ₹5,000 (3%) and ₹10,000 (7%). Prices may change without prior notice.
Privacy Policy
Last updated: January 2025
Data We Collect
We collect your phone number, name, delivery addresses, and order history to provide our service. Location data is only used for delivery routing.
Data Sharing
We do not sell your personal data. Delivery address is shared with our drivers only for active orders. Payment data is handled by third-party processors.
Contact
Email: [email protected] · Phone: +91 8090 000000 · Address: Housizy Pvt. Ltd., Lucknow, UP 226001
0
Cart
FAQ & Help
Tap a question to see the answer
How fast is delivery?
We deliver in 60 minutes within Lucknow city limits for in-stock items. Express 30-min delivery is available for select areas. Time may vary during peak hours or adverse weather.
What is the minimum order?
Minimum order value is ₹500. There is no minimum for B2B / bulk orders.
How do I get a GST invoice?
GST invoice is automatically generated for every order. Go to Orders → tap the order → tap Invoice. You can download as PDF or share via WhatsApp.
Can I cancel my order?
Yes, orders can be cancelled while in 'Packing' status. Once dispatched, cancellation is not possible. Go to Orders → tap the order → Cancel.
What is the return policy?
Damaged or wrong items can be returned within 48 hours. Go to Account → Returns & Exchanges. Refunds are processed in 3–5 business days.
How do Housizy Coins work?
You earn 1 Coin for every ₹100 spent. 10 Coins = ₹1 discount. Coins can be redeemed at checkout. Coins expire after 6 months.
Do you deliver outside Lucknow?
Currently we serve Lucknow city only. We are expanding to Kanpur, Agra, and Varanasi. Enter your PIN code on checkout to check availability.
How do I track my order?
Go to Orders → tap any active order → Track. You'll see the driver's live location on map with ETA.
What payment methods are accepted?
We accept UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), Cash on Delivery, and Housizy Coins. Credit/debit card support coming soon.
How do I contact support?
Go to Account → Support. You can live chat, call +91 8090 000000, or raise a complaint. Average response time is under 3 minutes.
💬
Still need help?
Our team replies in under 3 minutes
